codeReview.summary: The /v1/models endpoint was already implemented in standalone-server.ts. The worker correctly identified that model objects were missing the 'name' field and added it. The implementation properly fetches models from 'cursor-agent models', parses the output using regex, and returns OpenAI-compatible model objects with id, name, object, created, and owned_by fields. The endpoint correctly works without authentication as required.

summary: Feature implementation passes review. The /v1/models endpoint correctly fetches models from 'cursor-agent models' CLI and exposes them in OpenAI-compatible format with both id and name fields. The worker followed proper procedure, ran build verification, and manually tested the endpoint with curl. No issues found.
